input.prompt:
I have two ASP.NET Core 8 services communicating via RabbitMQ. Service A publishes
an order event and Service B consumes it. Traces show up fine within each service
but I can't see the end-to-end distributed trace across the queue boundary.
How do I propagate the trace context through message headers? Don't create files.

data.reasoningText: The user is asking about propagating OpenTelemetry/distributed trace context across RabbitMQ message boundaries between two ASP.NET Core 8 services. They want to know how to inject trace context into message headers on the publisher side and extract it on the consumer side. They don't want me to create files - just explain.
